programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Quinn immediately takes action to stop the spread of a deadly epidemic.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Mike's stoic, disapproving Bostonian mother, Elizabeth, who, after years of estrangement, visits her daughter in Colorado Springs but finds her unconventional life on the frontier difficult to accept.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: To Kill With Intrigue
programme.desc: After the execution of his family by a gang, Lei Shao-feng is spared by its afflicting leader who stands in the way of him becoming reunited with his love, as does a traitorous friend, who takes advantage of their predicament.

programme.title: Snake & Crane Arts Of Shaolin [Cantonese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A martial arts book, which Hsu Yin-Fung (Jackie Chan) carries, is being highly sought by various clans and gangs, but he is in pursuit of someone himself.

programme.title: Dragon Fist
programme.desc: Tong Huo-wan (Jackie Chan) seeks redress from the man responsible for his master's death, but becomes entangled in a feud between a local clan and gangsters.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York cops, Billy Wong and Danny Garoni, head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord, Mr. Ko.

programme.title: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a shrewd cop who goes undercover with a team of mercenaries when a man he put away two years before commits a murder. The film features the great Sammo Hung as well as the terrific Tony Leung Ka Fai.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this international case of extortion, murder and stolen identities, scam-artist Albert J. Walker assumes the identity of co-worker Ronald Platt. Platt later turns up dead in an ocean with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.desc: Kirk and Rasheeda deal with the long awaited DNA test results. Stevie clashes with Estelita and tries to replace her with a new first lady of Danger Zone. A new face in the A causes a splash on the scene. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: The Frost family is shook by Jasmine's pop up at Pressed. Erica mixes it up with old friends, ex friends, and a new love interest. Sierra's smitten with her new boo, but a revelation about her estranged husband leaves her heartbroken.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Sierra and Shooter's marital drama is put on pause by a shocking death in the family. Dime takes a pregnancy test. Estelita gets the courage to confront Stevie. Tommie and Spice share a heart to heart.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Kirk and Jasmine meet face to face for the first time in a year, and Shooter leans on his friends Keely and K. Botchey while grieving for his son.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta

programme.title: Babies of the plains
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Macaque Island
programme.desc: Exploreing the captivating cityscape, where Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop, before meeting the wilder Hill Troop's old alpha, Aarav.

programme.title: Wild Fighters
programme.desc: Investigating the different reasons that lead animals to face tough disputes.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: The Coral Triangle reef is part of the so-called Ring of Fire, a 40,000 km volcanic belt that surrounds the land perimeter of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: The Hippo Supremacy
programme.desc: Zambia's Luangwa River hippos are living the easy life, or so it seems. They are one of the heaviest creatures on Earth, and life fluctuates between the serenity of sunbathing and the terrible brutality of dominance and aggression.

programme.title: The egg: Bursting into life
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Islands
programme.desc: Exploring a 1,500-year-old monastery among the dizzying crags of the world-famous Skellig Islands; Spy Manx shearwaters and humpback whales, pygmy shrews on Clare, and the Aran Islands at an autumn spectacle.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Massive elephant seals go nose to nose to win the title of beach master; giant petrels earn the nickname "murderous garbagemen"; a female humpback goes to extremes to protect her calf from amorous males.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Julz and Henry from the ZCP track the Kakumbi pups, who face off with a stubborn, razor-tusked warthog; Thandie Mweetwa, ZCP's lion specialist, counts the prides that are pushing the Manzi out of their territory.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs. Pride
programme.desc: Tangle with a leopard; exploring mealtime hierarchy and witnessing a sad vigil.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: A variety of insects make Australia's forests their home.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: Climbing up into the cloud forest and peeking inside a waypoint for migrating birds.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Face relentless rays with an adaptable cat and marvel at a never-thirsty plant.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the car that the famous singer Nora Anita loved and drove for nearly half a century. Zenigata and the police are after him, but they won't make a move for fear of damaging the priceless car. Where is Lupin headed in the treasured car?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While in Italy, Lupin gets a call from someone claiming to have kidnapped Fujiko. The kidnapper blackmails Lupin into stealing a marionette once owned by Gennai Hiraga and now being kept in a mansion in Tokyo.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.desc: Clayton Kershaw records his 3000th career strikeout before the Dodgers walk off the White Sox.

programme.desc: The first installment of the 1939 serial starring Bela Lugosi.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Ortega, JV y Mario reciben a Mari A en la playa. De vuelta a casa, JV intenta ligar con Leticia. Ortega acude a una cita con Mari F. En la primera suite principal, la recién llegada Mari A, elige a JV. Leticia, Haexa y Vaski salen a buscar a otro ex.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how some foods are better than others. Chef Brockett makes a tasty snack. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday discovers Old Goat eating from his garden. The King plants seeds everywhere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture of a blue tree. In art, you can make things any way you want. He also talks about visiting art museums.

programme.desc: Maggie Stewart invites Mister Rogers to her home where she and Chef Brockett are making bread pudding for a family reunion. Prince Tuesday tells Chef Brockett he doesn't like what he sees in the mirror. Chef Brockett tells the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a robot factory. A robot talks with Lady Elaine but does not understand the term like. Daniel talks to the robot about caring. Handyman Negri tells Daniel that it's great to love others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers that his parents sometimes had to say "no" to keep him safe. Then, King Friday says "yes" to officiating a wedding.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees Bob Trow paint a portrait of Mr. McFeely. Robert Troll paints a portrait of King Friday who asks Lady Aberlin to have everyone copy it for themselves. Lady Aberlin explains that art comes from within each person.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man

programme.desc: Elk calls echo through the mountains where Laramy is hunting. As night falls, Laramy gets within shooting range of a huge elk.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man
programme.desc: Laramy chases after the big game cat of North America, the mountain lion! Known for dropping out of trees on unsuspecting prey, will Laramy be able to find this lion, before the lion finds him?

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: RiffTrax: Day of the Shorts SF Sketchfest 2019

programme.title: Rifftrax Shorts: The Calendar: How To Use It

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Last Woman on Earth

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor is forced to work on an alien ship where patients' care is determined by their social status instead of medical need.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness
programme.desc: When a ruthless mastermind, Khan (Benedict Cumberbatch) declares a one-man war on the Federation, Captain Kirk (Chris Pine), Spock (Zachary Quinto), and the crew of the U.S.S. Enterprise set out on their most explosive manhunt of all time.

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: On a rescue mission, the USS Enterprise is attacked by Krall, a warlord sworn against the Federation. Crashed on an uncharted world, the crew must join forces with Jaylah, a rebellious alien warrior, to escape and stop Krall from triggering all-out war.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture - The Director's Edition
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise proudly soars again in this new, beautifully restored Director's Edition of the original Star Trek movie classic. This edition features enhanced visual effects and a new sound mix, supervised by legendary director Robert Wise.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: 23rd century: the Federation Starship U.S.S. Enterprise™ is on routine training maneuvers, and Admiral James T. Kirk seems resigned to the fact that this inspection may well be the last space mission of his career. But Khan is back...

programme.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirk’s defeat of Khan and the creation of the Genesis planet are empty victories. Spock is dead and McCoy is inexplicably being driven insane. Then a surprise visit from Sarek, Spock’s father, provides a startling revelation.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Two scientists working on an off-world research project witness SG-1 captured in a Goa'uld raid and attempt to rescue them. Little do they know that SG-1 staged the capture in order to infiltrate the Goa'uld and make contact with a Tok'ra informant.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra must take refuge from the Goa'uld at the SGC Alpha Site occupied by Jaffa. Bad blood between the races begins to boil as an assassin wreaks havoc on the camp. Can O'Neill stop the bloodshed before the assassin escapes with coordinates?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 visits Pangar, a planet inhabited by humans who have developed a drug that makes their immune systems perfect. Unknown to SG-1 is the means by which the drug is produced, a startling discovery that may hold the key to the origins of the Tok'ra!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Rogue NSA officers hijack the X-303 spaceship and demand that Adrian Conrad be brought to the ship. Using his Goa'uld knowledge, Conrad activates the X-303 and takes the ship light-years from Earth as O'Neill and Teal'c stage a daring rescues.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 is marooned in deep space, Thor comes to the rescue. He then seek O'Neill's help to combat the Replicators. Convinced they will attack earth if not stopped, O'Neill stages a daring mission to stop the Replicators once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Wanting to maintain diplomatic relations, Sheppard and McKay accompany Harmony, a precocious young princess, on a mandatory rite of passage. However, they are unaware that she has enemies, and character flaws, yet to be dealt with.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Lt. Colonel John Sheppard receives word that his father has passed away he returns to Earth. But once there, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous experiment gone awry—a human form Replicator now on the loose that must be recaptured at all cost.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission in a village rocked by fierce tremors, Col. Samantha Carter, Dr. McKay, and Dr. Keller become trapped when they fall into a sinkhole. But every attempt to escape the confines of the chamber puts them in further jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The IOA has entrusted Mr. Coolidge, with interviewing Teyla Emmagan and Ronan Dex about their suitability to continue with the Atlantis expedition. Unbeknownst to anyone, a plan by the Wraith to invade the Midway station is about to be initiated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla, more determined than ever to find the missing Athosians, convinces Sheppard to travel with her to a trading settlement in search for answers. What they find there leads them to startling discovery that no one could have anticipated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After an unforeseen return, Dr. Carson Beckett shares that he has been held captive. As Teyla is re-united with some missing fellow Athosians, she begins to formulate a plan to ensure their escape, if she is able to find them in time.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Disheartened by another unsuccessful search for Teyla, Lt. Colonel Sheppard returns to Atlantis and senses that something is not right—the city has been abandoned. Now, McKay sets out on a risky plan to reverse a future that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: As Sheppard and Ronon are trapped beneath a collapsed compound, McKay and Lorne are trapped in another pocket of debris. Michael’s flagship Wraith Cruiser hurtles towards the compound, while Carter leads a rescue mission. Who will reach them first?

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After Racers become violently ill during a challenge, the stress of the Race finally catches up to one team as a Racer threatens to qui.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams travel to South Korea where they battle it out on water and ice to make the final three.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams soar to new heights over Southern California, competing in the final leg for a shot at the million-dollar prize and, for two teams, the chance to become the first ever all-female team to win the series.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven former Teams who fell short of winning the $1 million prize during their first Race around the globe will return for another shot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by a swarming sea of people on the congested streets of India, one team narrowly dodges a traffic collision while another's clumsiness threatens to spoil their chances of acing the Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the crowded streets of India, one team makes a costly blunder while another Racer takes a desperate plunge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Confronted by a psychological Detour, teams try to avoid making a Freudian slip in the slick streets of Austria, and a hefty meal proves to be too big for some teams' stomachs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The stress of the Race begins to take its toll when a Double U-Turn is revealed, and one Team struggles to consume a local delicacy while others become acquainted with Swiss hospitality.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams brave bone-chilling temperatures as they come face-to-face with the world famous Matterhorn, and tempers flare in the most intense argument of the season.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a prosperous rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from the man's vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.desc: Columnist Jordan Herrick is startled to learn that a famous movie actress hasn't aged in years. Intrigued, he investigates... and soon learns a terrifying secret.

programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jared Garrity arrives in the Old West town of Happiness, Arizona, proclaiming he can revive the dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A factory CEO replaces human workers with machines.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Two unhappy children find a happy escape in a swimming pool.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.desc: Carol and Daryl go on a mission together while Siddiq struggles to solve a mystery.

programme.desc: Carol pushes boundaries that make Daryl uncomfortable; Alpha and Beta have reservations about someone.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must figure out how to get out of a precarious situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must defend Alexandria from a threatening outside force.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Whisperers are coming for Hilltop; after Daryl and Lydia's encounter with Alpha, the communities must decide whether to run or fight; Eugene's communication with Stephanie gets complicated.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne takes Virgil back to his mysterious island to reunite with his family; in exchange, Virgil promises weapons that could change the tide of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Negan's help, Alpha and the Whisperers attack Hilltop.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Heroes and villains reckon with the aftermath of the Hilltop fire; Eugene takes a group on a journey to meet Stephanie, with the hopes of befriending another civilization.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities prepare for the final battle of the Whisperer War; meanwhile, Eugene's group encounters Princess.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beta engages the final battle of the Whisperer War.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie returns, to the dismay of Negan; the trials she endured since leaving have made her harder in order for her and her son to survive; Daryl and Maggie unexpectedly fight an unseen and unknown threat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol find an old cabin that takes Daryl back to his years away from the group after Rick disappeared; he relives the painful memory of meeting a reticent survivor and the toxic events that amplified his relationship with Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With Maggie's map, Gabriel and Aaron search for food and supplies to bring back to Alexandria; checking out one more location, they chance upon a stash; faith is broken and optimism is fragmented when they are put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko, and Princess are captured and separated by the mysterious troopers that surrounded them at the rail yard; claustrophobic with mounting anxiety, Princess struggles with memories of her traumatic past and plans to escape.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Jesus y Aaron encuentran a Eugene, pero la horda de zombis parlantes los persigue incansablemente. Entretanto, en Alexandria, Negan escapa de su confinamiento porque a Gabriel se le olvida cerrar la puerta de su celda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl libera a Henry porque le estaba contando demasiadas cosas a Lydia y, después, interroga a la adolescente sobre su grupo. Entetanto, el grupo de Magna desobedece a Tara y se adentra por la noche en el bosque en busca de Luke.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de salvajes que lidera Alpha ataca Hilltop para recuperar a su hija. Mientras tanto, una misión en busca de suministros se convierte en una lucha entre la vida y la muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Henry encuentra a Lydia, pero Beta, la mano derecha de Alpha, lo captura. En Alexandria, Michonne discute con el consejo si deben participar en la feria con el resto de las comunidades.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Connie, Henry y Lydia se ocultan en un edificio para tenderle una trampa a Beta. Mientras tanto, el Reino sufre la amenaza de un grupo de extorsionistas que patrulla las carreteras y exige dinero a cambio de transitar por ellas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre el espeluznante origen de las misteriosas cicatrices que Michonne y Daryl lucen en la espalda, el motivo por el cual la actitud de Michonne hacia los forasteros cambió tanto desde la desaparición de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Por primera vez en años, las cuatro comunidades se reúnen durante la feria que organiza el Reino. Alpha aprovecha la ocasión para infiltrarse de incógnito entre los visitantes de la feria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se desata una tormenta de nieve terrible que sorprende al grupo de Ezekiel viajando hacia Hilltop. Su única esperanza reside en cruzar la frontera que estableció Alpha y acortar el trayecto a través del territorio que tienen prohibido pisar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Oceanside, el grupo continúa entrenando en caso de que los Susurradores regresen. Las tensiones aumentan, mientras los supervivientes tratan de aferrarse a lo que queda en pie de su concepto de civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se revela el origen de Alpha y Beta. Además, Alpha intenta endurecer a Lydia a medida que se preparan para caminar junto a los muertos, y los Susurradores crean sus hordas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La creciente amenaza del regreso de los Susurradores dispara la paranoia en Alexandría. Además, Carol lucha contra su sed de venganza.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los habitantes de Alexandría están paranoicos y enloquecidos con los Susurradores. Además, de regreso en la Colonia Hilltop, un grupo lidia con un inesperado problema de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Desaparecen provisiones de Hilltop. Además, un habitante de Alexandría idolatra a Negan. Ezekiel guarda un secreto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl emprenden una misión juntos. Mientras tanto, Siddiq intenta resolver un misterio.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tall, powerfully built girl, Kitten Twitty, registers at a hotel and secret agent James T. West carries her trunk to her room, not knowing it contains his archenemy—diminutive, giggling Dr. Loveless.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon find the town of Willow Springs looted and its citizens completely immobile -- victims of a mysterious paralysis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent, James T. West, investigating the murder of a fellow agent, discovers a plot to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Norwegian Nightmare, Nikki Krampus makes her long-awaited debut. Beaten in a back alley, Keta Rush seeks revenge against her assailant The Dagger. But Keta soon finds that to succeed she will have to fight off the more than just The Dagger.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: A new Champion in WOW is coming to terms with the fact the bullseye of her competitors is now squarely focused on her. Havok, The Monster Of Madness emerges as a threat to the WOW roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Dedicated to her ambition of never quitting, Stephy Slays demonstrates perseverance in an extraordinary match against The Disciplinarian. The smart ending will be unforgettable. Meanwhile, Tessa Blanchard takes her biggest risk since joining WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard is the new WOW World Champion, and The Beast, Jungle Grrrl, and Havok The Monster Of Madness have lined up to challenge the Champion. A Triple Threat Number One Contender Match will decide who will wrestle Tessa Blanchard.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard seemingly conspires with World’s Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez to handpick her Championship opponent ...WOW’s newest competitor, Mexico’s high flying Luchadora Serpentine.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Foes Jungle Grrrl and The Beast are forced to put aside their differences to battle The Monsters of Madness, Havok, and Hazard. Can the two animals of the ring coexist long enough to secure victory? The Tag Team Championship Series continues.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their path to the ring. Keta Rush goes from bullied to bully buster, Tiki Chamorro represents the true pride of her island of Guam, and Kandi Krush rises from crushed Olympic dreams to crushing her opponents.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their path to the ring. Americana personifies the athleticism of WOW. She talks about her upbringing and how gymnastics are a part of her life.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal their surprising backstories. Miami Sweet Heat's physical therapy patients are the real superheroes, Princess Aussie's journey to the U.S. almost didn't happen, and Jennifer Florez represents a new generation of wrestlers.

programme.title: My Road To WOW
programme.desc: WOW Superheroes reveal what drove them into the ring. Sahara Spars opens up about a traumatic life-changing experience, Jessie Jones reveals her long journey to the top, and Leia Makoa makes her parents and her island proud.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Tessa Blanchard invades WOW - Women Of Wrestling demanding a Championship Title Match. Champion Santana Garrett lets Tessa know she better get in line.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: With her father physically assaulted by Tessa Blanchard, Santana Garrett vows that the Championship is now second to her personal issues with The Born Legend.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: The Beast demands her shot at the WOW World Championship. Current Champion Santana Garrett’s eyes remain locked on revenge against Tessa Blanchard. And Tessa provides an exclusive interview that explains her reasons for attacking Santana’s father.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants… a shot at the Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women Of Wrestling (Classic)
programme.desc: Psycho Sister Razor has her debut match against Faith The Lioness. Plus, following the unprecedented Triple Threat Match, the most prestigious prize in women’s wrestling, the WOW World Championship Title, is decided tonight!
